abilities.name: Grave Dynamo
abilities.text: Increase the model limit of friendly Mindless Zombie models to 10.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Siphon Power
abilities.text: When this model declares an action, it may deal 1 damage to a friendly model within 4" to add a suit of its choice to the duel.

actions.name: Graveyard Dust
actions.effects: This model may kill a Mindless Zombie within 2" of the target to deal +2 damage.

triggers.name: Dessication
triggers.text: Friendly undead models within (aura)2" of the target heal 1.

actions.name: Return of the Living Dead
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action has a raise value of 3.
actions.effects: Summon one Mindless Zombie within range. For each raise this action receives, summon an additional Mindless Zombie within range.

triggers.name: Graveyard Smash
triggers.text: Once per turn. Place this model into base contact with a model summoned by this action and draw a card.

triggers.name: Dust to Dust
triggers.text: Choose a model summoned by this action. Enemy models within (aura)2" of the chosen model are dealt 1 damage and gain an Injured token. Then, kill the chosen model.

actions.name: Macabre Infusion
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target, and then kill the target.
